title: Comfort Professional Fabric Conditioner Mix & Match Any 2 Fresh 4.8L & 5L, Sunshine, Sensorial, Sensitive, Outdoor Freshness, Tropical Burst & Pure 77 Wash & 178 Wash
features: VARIETY OPTIONS: Mix and match any 2 variants from Fresh, Sunshine, Sensorial, Sensitive, Outdoor Freshness, Tropical Burst, and Pure collections
PRODUCT SIZES: Available in 4.8L bottles with 77 washes and 5L bottles with up to 178 washes for long-lasting fabric care
SPECIALISED FORMULAS: Choose from Classic Fresh, Maximum Softening, Fresh Floral, Sensitive Skin, and Hypoallergenic options
PROFESSIONAL QUALITY: Comfort Professional range designed for superior fabric conditioning and lasting freshness
FRAGRANCE SELECTION: Multiple scent options including Classic Freshness, Outdoor Freshness, and Tropical Burst for personalised laundry care
description: Product description Transform your laundry routine with Comfort Professional Fabric Conditioner's versatile Mix & Match collection. Choose from an array of delightful variants including Fresh Classic for memorable freshness, Sunshine Classic for maximum softening, Sensorial Classic with fresh floral fragrance, Sensitive Classic formulated for delicate skin, Classic Outdoor Freshness, Tropical Burst for long-lasting freshness, and Pure hypoallergenic option. Available in generous 4.8L bottles providing 77 washes or 5L bottles offering up to 178 washes, these fabric conditioners cater to every household's needs. The comprehensive range ensures your clothes remain wonderfully soft and fragranced, whilst the Mix & Match option allows you to personalise your laundry experience by selecting any two variants. Whether you prefer classic freshness, tropical bursts, or need a sensitive skin formula, this professional-grade collection delivers outstanding fabric care for all your garments. Ingredients Does Not Apply
